title: Iran leaves message of peace after World Cup draw in Los Angeles

snapshot.title: Iran leaves message of peace after World Cup draw in Los Angeles
snapshot.description: LONDON: The Iran national football team left a handwritten message calling for peace and friendship after their World Cup group-stage match against Belgium in Los Angeles on Sunday. The note, left in the dressing room following the goalless draw, thanked the city for its hospitality and paid tribute to Iranian supporters. “From the ancient Persia of thousands of years ago to
snapshot.author: Arab News
snapshot.pageTitle: Iran leaves message of peace after World Cup draw in Los Angeles | Arab News
